name: @sparrowhawk-labs/pinion-ui-css
description: Standalone theme × tune CSS for pinion-ui — plain pre-compiled dist consumed by React / Vue / Astro / vanilla with zero build tooling. Generated from the same source as the Blade preset; computed-style-identical (golden-harness verified).

scripts.ref: npm run gen:fixture && npm run build:ref && npm run verify && npm run capture && npm run selfcheck
scripts.gate:dist: node harness/capture.mjs --css dist/pinion-ui.css --label dist --out harness/golden/dist.json && node harness/diff.mjs harness/golden/reference.json harness/golden/dist.json
scripts.dist: npm run build:dist && npm run gate:dist
